    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class main.GamePanel
    Paints the game panel, rendering the current game state.
    PAUSE_BACKGROUND - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    PauseButton - Class in ui
    The PauseButton class represents a button in the pause screen.
    PauseButton(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class ui.PauseButton
     
    PauseOverlay - Class in ui
    The PauseOverlay class represents the overlay displayed when the game is paused.
    PauseOverlay(Playing) - Constructor for class ui.PauseOverlay
     
    PhysicsComponent - Class in components
    Component responsible for handling gravity, jumping, and falling physics of an entity.
    PhysicsComponent() - Constructor for class components.PhysicsComponent
     
    play - Variable in class ui.GameOverOverlay
     
    Player - Class in entities
    Class representing the player entity in the game.
    Player(float, float, int, int, Playing) - Constructor for class entities.Player
     
    PLAYER - Enum constant in enum class factories.EntityType
     
    PLAYER_ATLAS - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    PlayerConstants() - Constructor for class utilz.Constants.PlayerConstants
     
    Playing - Class in gamestates
    The Playing class represents the gameplay state, handling player actions, level progression, and overlays.
    Playing(Game, EntityFactory) - Constructor for class gamestates.Playing
     
    PLAYING - Enum constant in enum class gamestates.GameState
     
    Potion - Class in objects
    The Potion class represents a potion object in the game.
    Potion(int, int, int) - Constructor for class objects.Potion
     
    POTION_HEIGHT - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.ObjectConstants

    potions - Variable in class objects.ObjectManager
     
    POTIONS_ATLAS - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
